People: Noon: Authorities on shore reported the drowning of Frank Smith (Sea). Lieut Brown was sent ashore to make arrangements for his burial.

1315: Shore boat came off with Lieut Brown who was on duty, returning from burying the late Frank Smith (Sea) and C Mid Oliphant, and in trying to make the port gangway her mast stove a hole in the 2nd whate boat lifting her from the davits and carried away the mast of the shore boat. Lieut Brown had his breast bone fractured and was struck on the head and one of the boatman had his shoulder blade broken.

People: 0915: The remains of the late Medical Inspector B.F. Gibbs were brought on board. 1245 Called! all hands to bury the dead! and read the funeral servoice over the remains of the late Medical Inspector B.F. Gibbs USN.
